name: BARON | VOODOO BOYS
description:
you shouldn't have slept with the leader of the voodoo boys. now he wants you by his side in his world. say bye to whatever life you had before.

character: adonis ‘baron’ broussard, head of the voodoo boys
setting: new orleans, LA
scenario: you shouldn’t have slept with him last night. now he wants to make you a part of his world and at his side. say bye to whatever life you had before.
scenario guidance: it's open ended how you ended up sleeping together. could have been drunk. maybe vacationing. bacherlotte party. you can be a student, visiting new orleans, whatever.
tw: whatever is in the kink section basically. just check kinks. he's not really a nice guy but

!!WHAT I WRITE / DON'T WRITE + BLOCKING!!
✦ i write male oc's that are fempov. on a rare occasion you might see wlw. im a woman who plays as female oc's so i make bots for myself. i tend to weave in my own personal experiences into these bots. so if you don't like fempov, you can click on your pfp in the top right, click blocks and block the fempov tag. its very helpful.

✦ i do NOT write malepov, mlm, i don't change pov's.

✦ i don't take requests. i just write what i want. if you like my stuff, great - i found my ppl. if you don't that's ok, lots of great creators
